productDisplayName: Puma Men's Yacht Battleship Black Red Shoe
description: Look trendy and stay comfortable in these Yatch Battleship lifestyle shoes from puma. This black and white combo is a fresh take on the classic design and looks cool on the yatch and off it.Upper Black suede uppers for comfort and protection Stitch detailing in the form of formstripes on the sides Contrast lace-ups for snug Fit Leather lining for greater comfort cat logo on the tongue Midsole Cushioned insole for all day comfort Phylon midsole for comfort and stability Outsole Rubber non-marking outsole with thin horizontal grooves Scooped heel and flex groove on forefoot with ventilation holes for maximum cushioned comfort
